HGSS.146.0002:
Well, hello!
That was something you don’t see\r
every day!\f
That Pokémon is GROUDON,
a legendary Pokémon in the Hoenn myth\r
about the shaping of that region.\f
I see...\f
The Embedded Tower was built
by the people from Hoenn.\f
HGSS.146.0003:
The Tower that binds together
the sea, the land, and the sky...\f
GROUDON was not the only Pokémon
described in the Hoenn myth...\f
This place may still be hiding
its secrets...\f
HGSS.146.0004:
The knowledgeable Pokémon Professor
may be able to tell you more when you\r
show him GROUDON.\f
Phew!\f
There are so many connections between
Pokémon and myths.\f
See you around.\f
